title: [DISCONTINUED] Open Your Eye: Legacy
description: A data pack/mod that changes the recipe for Eyes of Ender, making obtaining them much more of a late game task.
body:
> # [Check out the remake!](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-your-eye)

This is a data pack/mod that makes reaching the End a lot more of a late game task, making it much more challenging to obtain by changing the crafting recipe for the Eye of Ender. This mod was inspired by deepore's "Endgame Dragon" mod.

I recommend using some mods to spice up the End and make it worth the challenge.

![new_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UGcjLiUW/images/afad5bffbadc6440d8b611cf7042e6b422c5a19f.png)

#

### Q: Can I use this in my modpack?
A: Of course! This mod was meant for modpacks!

### Q: Can I redistrubute this?
A: Unless you're in a third-world country, no.

### Q: There's a bug, how can I report it?
A: This version is no longer receiving updates, [check out the remake!](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-your-eye)
